title: Social media giants urged to tighten child safety after UK rejects blanket ban for teens
summary_full: Social media firms need to use better age verification technologies to keep children off their platforms, the U.K.'s Information Commissioner's Office said.
summary_public: Social media firms need to use better age verification technologies to keep children off their platforms, the U.K.'s Information Commissioner's Office said.
